_comment: Sandbox for the UNATTENDED weekly curate (curate-cron.sh). proposals-only: the headless run may READ anything and WRITE only to the proposals dir. It is denied ALL writes under ~/.claude (memory, skills, agents, CLAUDE.md, settings). Memory facts it wants to add are written INTO the proposal for the human to apply via the review-proposals skill.
_paths: Permission rules below use ${HOME} for portability. Point the proposals globs at your own notes-vault (the dir curate-cron.sh writes to: $CLAUDE_VAULT/agent/proposals). Replace ${HOME}/notes if your vault lives elsewhere.
